items.title: Halftime: #Magic 65, Sixers 37
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
Halftime: #Magic 65, Sixers 37

Jase Richardson (3 for 4 from 3) has 17 points, Lester Quinones with 10 points, Noah Penda has 6 points, 3 rebounds and 5 assists and Colin Castleton with 8 points and 6 rebounds.

Orlando’s starters have completely controlled this one.

items.title: Ducks, Rangers, exit Victory+, which has reportedly missed recent rights payments.
items.author: Sports Media Watch
items.body_excerpt:
Ducks, Rangers, exit Victory+, which has reportedly missed recent rights payments.

Local rights landscape remains shaky as leagues prep centralized RSN solution -- with Adam Silver saying the NBA's will "absolutely" launch next year. www.sportsmediawatch.com/2026/07/vict...

media.title: From the jaws of Victory+: Teams exit streamer as local rights remain shaky
media.description: The local media rights landscape continues to shift, with one of the newer players -- Victory+ -- suffering a pair of back-to-back setbacks.

items.title: T-Wolves up 62-51. Pacers 17 of 42 from the floor, 6 of 16 from 3, 6 of 8 at the line. T-Wolves 19 of 36, 4 of 12, 11 of 12. Slawson 12 points, six rebounds, three assists, four blocks, three turnovers. McGlothan 9 points. Isaiah Evans 10, Zyon Pullin 10, Trey Kaufman-Renn 10.
items.author: Dustin Dopirak
items.body_excerpt: T-Wolves up 62-51. Pacers 17 of 42 from the floor, 6 of 16 from 3, 6 of 8 at the line. T-Wolves 19 of 36, 4 of 12, 11 of 12. Slawson 12 points, six rebounds, three assists, four blocks, three turnovers. McGlothan 9 points. Isaiah Evans 10, Zyon Pullin 10, Trey Kaufman-Renn 10.

items.title: Sumemr Pacers down 62-51 at the half. It was a foul-filled half, with 31 called.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Sumemr Pacers down 62-51 at the half. It was a foul-filled half, with 31 called.

Jalen Slawson has 12-6-3 and four blocks. Gabe McGlothan with 9pts off the bench. 13 guys have played.

items.title: pretty good time for a pausa de hidracion
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt: pretty good time for a pausa de hidracion

items.title: Some disaster turnovers for the Pacers that half simply inbounding the ball. And they had 18 fouls. Just a lot of sloppy, summer league basketball. Some good stuff, too, including a 12-point, four-block half from Jalen Slawson.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Some disaster turnovers for the Pacers that half simply inbounding the ball. And they had 18 fouls. Just a lot of sloppy, summer league basketball. Some good stuff, too, including a 12-point, four-block half from Jalen Slawson.

items.title: End of the 1st quarter: #Magic 30, Sixers 17
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
End of the 1st quarter: #Magic 30, Sixers 17

Jase Richardson (2 for 3 from 3) leads with 10 points, Alex Morales has 6 points and 4 rebounds, and 5 points apiece from Lester Quinones and Philip Wheeler.

Orlando shot 6 for 9 from 3, Philadelphia 3 for 10.
